_comment: Task-matched eval scene #2: BATTERIES -> tray. yellow_block_basic_robolab stands in for the yellow
Amazon-Basics batteries in the real data (yellow, block-shaped). Caption copied from a training
instruction. Verify yellow_block spawn Z/scale + camera framing with a debug render before the scored
eval (it's a new asset vs the corn_can the sim was tuned on). remote_host = the v8 server.
